LanguageData.Computer_LearningBoost.label: 学习促进
LanguageData.Computer_LearningBoost.stages.0.label: 次要的
LanguageData.Computer_LearningBoost.stages.1.label: 主要的
LanguageData.Computer_LearningBoost.stages.2.label: 最大限度
LanguageData.VFE_ListeningToMusic.description: 目前通过听音乐获得娱乐。
LanguageData.VFE_ListeningToMusic.label: 听音乐
LanguageData.Minor_CryptoSickness.label: 隐睡病（轻微）
LanguageData.VFES_Stab.label: 碎片
LanguageData.VFES_Dazzled.description: 过度暴露在光线下会导致视力严重受损。
LanguageData.VFES_Dazzled.label: 眼花缭乱
LanguageData.VFES_PlatformTerrain.label: 平台
LanguageData.VFES_TrenchTerrain.label: 沟
LanguageData.VCE_AteRawPufferfish.label: 最近吃了生河豚
LanguageData.VCEF_CaughtSpecialHediff.description: 这个人钓到了一些特别的东西。
LanguageData.VCEF_CaughtSpecialHediff.label: 最近钓到了一些特别的东西
LanguageData.MightJoin.label: 可能会加入
LanguageData.StandOff.label: 对峙
LanguageData.Traitor.label: 叛徒
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.description: 在初次攻击后的相当长一段时间内，酸液飞溅会继续造成烧伤。
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.label: 酸烧伤
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.stages.0.label: 轻微烧伤
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.stages.1.label: 中度烧伤
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.stages.2.label: 严重烧伤
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBurn.label: 酸烧伤
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.description: 这种生物以阳光为食。光照不足会杀死它。
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.label: 日照水平
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.0.label: 充足的光线
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.1.label: 光线水平不佳
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.2.label: 光照水平非常低
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.3.label: 缺乏阳光
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.4.label: 极度缺乏生计
LanguageData.VFES_FreshAir.description: 感觉空气清新，味道好闻！
LanguageData.VFES_FreshAir.label: 干净的空气
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.description: 先进的床睡眠系统提供优质的卧床休息
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.label: 提神睡眠
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.stages.0.label: 次要的
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.stages.1.label: 主要的
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.stages.2.label: 最大限度
LanguageData.Chemshined.description: 好像有人喝了一些挥发性的东西。
LanguageData.Chemshined.label: 化学光
LanguageData.Chemshined.stages.0.label: 化学闪耀（次要）
LanguageData.Chemshined.stages.1.label: 化学发光
LanguageData.Chemshined.stages.2.label: 化学发光（专业）
LanguageData.Chemshined.stages.3.label: 化学闪耀（极限）
LanguageData.Wanted.description: 此人被某个派系视为罪犯。
LanguageData.Wanted.label: 通缉
LanguageData.Wanted.stages.0.label: 通缉
LanguageData.BathedInSmallHotSpring.description: A recent soak in a hot spring accelerates the healing of wounds and recovery from illnesses for slightly over 24 hours after leaving the soothing waters.\n\n(The healing effects of this hediff are the same as the 'Healing waters' hediff. You do not need to constantly direct sick and/or injured pawns to repeatedly use the spring; a single visit per day is sufficient.)
LanguageData.BathedInSmallHotSpring.label: Residual rejuvenation
LanguageData.IntheSmallHotSpring.description: The therapeutic waters of a hot spring allow the body to heal wounds faster and recover from illnesses more quickly. Pawns do not mind temperatures of either extreme while submerged in the hot spring's waters.
LanguageData.IntheSmallHotSpring.label: Healing waters
